Wish.title: Wish
Wish.description: A wish left by a user on the Red Ribbon System.

text.description: The original text of the wish.

phrase.description: The text displayed on the ribbon.

userId.description: The unique identifier for the user who created the wish.

x.description: The horizontal position of the ribbon (0-100).

y.description: The vertical position of the ribbon (0-100).

/wishes/{wishId}.description: Stores all wishes left on the wishing tree.
